title: 150ml Glass Measuring Cup Double Spouts Espresso Cup Shot Glass Heat-Resistant Handle Transparent Scale Ounce Measure Jugs Mixing Mug for Bar Party Wine Milk Coffee Liquid Heavy Glass Measuring Cup
description:
About this item
Clear & Accurate Scale Options: The highest scale measurement is 150ml and 4 1/2 ounces, both side with conversion measure scale in graduated marks in ounces (0. 5oz increments) and milliliters (10ml increments). Accurate to within +/- 5%; Printed markings on clear beakers allows you to view, add, measure and adjust liquids; The small measuring glass shot with scale is convenient for scientific control of absorption, and easy for saving space and carried
Unique & Ergonomic Design: With good grip handle, the smooth glass surface will not stab your hands. Our espresso glasses made with heat-resistant handle and two V-shaped pour spout, you can freendly pour the coffee out on either side whether left-hander or right-hander, easily meet your daily modulation beverage, solid measurement, professional bartender needs, suitable for baristas, cocktail, match drink, milk, baking, cooking, wine, dining, wet / dry Ingredient distribution,etc.
Sturdy & Durable: Heat resistant graduated glass jar made by duable thicken glass, cup wall thickness up to 6 mm,stronger than ordinary glassware, not easy to break, more suitable for long-term use; And High quality high borosilicate can be heated directly on fire or frozen on refrigerator. It can withstand (maximum temperature)150℃/302℉, and (the lowest temperature) -20℃/-4℉
Safe in Use & Multipurpose: The glass measuring cup is crystal clear, high transmittance, clear and precise scale, made of nonporous glass that won't warp, stain, or absorb odors, Glass is preheated oven, microwave, fridge & freezer safe. You can use it as an ordinary water cup for daily drinking, such as drinking tea, coffee, milk, alcohol, etc.; you can also use it as a professional measuring cup, such as kitchen baking, bartending, experiments, etc. make your life more precise
Ideal Gift Choice: Simple & clear food Grade measuring glass cup with clear measuring levels ideal for dry & liquid measure, prepware glass measuring cup favored by beverage/drinking/coffee/ milk/cocktail/tea lovers,as gift for your family and friends, when birthday, housewarming, wedding, anniversary, halloween, christmas, new year, etc. NOTE: The measurement lines of this cup will come off in the dishwasher. Therefore, machine washing is not recommended! Sincerely hope for your understanding.
reviews_5s:
I bought this because trying to fit different sized coffee cups under the porter filter is a real drag. I brew with a scale and on the split dose porta filter this fits underneath on a Breville express impress with a slight tilt. It works great. The measurements on the side are easy to read so if you dose by volume it'll work. I use a scale. The pour spouts make going from the shot cup to the serving cup supper easy. I bought two of these thinking I would need two... The second one is still in the box, you will only need one .I was tired of having to replace perfectly good measuring cups because of the red printed quantity amounts to disappear so much you can’t see it. I don’t know if it is because our modern dishwashers are so harsh on the red paint OR the paint is cheap on the measuring cups I replaced with this embossed one. I purposely shopped for embossed quantities that won’t disappear. Love the lid for the refrigerator for pre measuring ingredients for a recipe to be made later.I have a 2.5 oz, but it was too small. It took a while to find this larger 4.5 oz/150 ml size. I
Ike that the spouts are on both side, it can be poured with either hand. Since I heat up syrup for a single serving in the microwave, I like to use the handle, so I don’t have to touch the hot base. I wash it by hand. My husband also uses it to dissolve his medicine and the graduation markings are helpful to measure the water. This size is more convenient than a cup sizeI only use this to melt butter for making single loaves of bread, so accuracy and being able to read lines don't really matter to me in this particular case. I got this after a different one that I purchased fell and broke on me, so I came to amazon to see what potential one I could get that would be small and functional. This fit my bill great, and I have been using it for about a year now, and think that it is great for what I am using it for.Recomendable vaso medidor. Ideal para la preparación de wafles.This is sleek and beautiful. Bought it to measure small portions very accurately. It is great! It looks like it is a cross between a fine Swedish or Finn minimalist serving set, or a super stylish chemistry set.Was perfect for what I needed.Great for measuring small amounts of liquid when cooking.I live this thing - especially for making drinks but my wife loves it as well for recipes. Perfect!My wife bakes and this is perfect for small volumes of liquid. The double handle is a bonus. Great item.
reviews_1s:
I was SO disappointed when It came in. It is OUNCES
Not CUPS. I THOUGHT I WAS ORDERING 4.5 cup side pore measuring cup
THAT IS WAY OVER PRICED, for such a tiny measuring cup!!!!!After one wash in the dishwasher, all of the measurements disappeared. It became useless.If you are careful this measuring cup will not break. I was not careful enough.The markings quickly washed off the glass. Now I just have a clear glass with no measuring marks.This item is painted, not embossed as described — an important detail, because the paint will come off in the dishwasher. It is NOT of a durable strength as described. — it is actually very lightweight and thin in construct, making it super delicate. My first package never arrived (and the “tracking package” in the verification photo was a padded envelope, which could never have accommodated two of these and actually contained books). The replacement order DID arrive in a well packed box, but the item is in no way as described other than it is a measuring cup.Nice glass, seems sturdy and durable. Left and right handed and handle are nice.

However, if it cannot measure properly neither English nor Metric, it's just an awful product. It was off by .5 oz at 3oz, and almost an entire ounce at 4.5oz. It was very strange.I bought a total of 3 of these because I liked them so much in the beginning. Within 2 months, the paint for the numbers on all of them has come off. It would just wipe off when wet. Don’t recommend, cheaply made.It says heavy and durable but it's very light and flimsy. I bought it to measure milk and espresso and it works but it's not going to last. I already see the lines fading after washing it a few times. I had my rattleware for years until I dropped it, it wasn't the first time I dropped it but this time it broke.When filled to the 4.5 oz line, it actually is 5.7 oz. Pretty terrible accuracy. The glass also feels really thin - it hasn't broken yet, but feels... "delicate" in the hand. Spout design is nice, but not sure who would want a measuring device that is off by more than 20%.Worked for a while but then I noticed the measurement lines were coming off. They come off so easily now I can just lightly wipe them off with my finger. Maybe it's not dishwasher safe. Either way, it was a great idea but ended up not working at all.
